name: Forest Hopper
personality: Bright, springy mascot with huge leaf ears and a moon-hop run.

name: Tiny Leafling
personality: Shy seedling creature that cheers after every escape.

name: Moss Fox
personality: Clever trickster with mossy tail swishes and playful taunts.

name: Stone Mole
personality: Chunky tunnel buddy with crystal goggles and victory belly flops.

name: Glow Bat
personality: Neon cave flyer with expressive ears and light-trail emotes.

name: Jungle Panda
personality: Round vine-swinging hero with snack-themed emotes.

name: Crystal Beaver
personality: Builder mascot with gemstone teeth and hammer-tail victory pose.

name: Golden Monkey
personality: Flashy rooftop acrobat with crown markings and showboat flips.
